steps.t: Venko is outside Tâg Fógarrach. No doubt the Zhélruka will be pleased to see the set of orders you recovered from the Angmarim cultist you defeated.
Venko saw something disturbing to the south-east, just behind Tâg Fógarrach, and he has asked you to investigate. Whatever he saw, the vision seems to…
Venko is outside Tâg Fógarrach, disturbed by whatever it was he saw.
Imák is south-west of Tûr Fúar, stroking his beard thoughtfully.
